TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tjuvecekadan, title = Tjuvecekadan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjuvecekadan} }

S.FORM: alang Tjuvecekadan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Haruhi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 304 buwan, 1,097 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 1,051 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 46 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tjuvecekadan hya' ga Kinayiman. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu

alang Tjuvecekadan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Haruhi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 304 buwan, 1,097 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 1,051 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 46 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tjuvecekadan hya' ga Kinayiman. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu
S.PHON: alaŋ tju*eʦ~ʨeka*an ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu ħaruħi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tju*eʦ~ʨeka*an ħjaʔ ɣa kinajiman. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu
